changes: Added collection: ^1.18.0 package to Performance & Optimization section
Package provides efficient algorithms and utilities for data manipulation in virtual lists
Added detailed implementation notes about the collection package usage
Noted that flutter_sticky_headers was already added in phase-1-subtask-3
Documented the collection package addition and its purposes

patterns_discovered: Consistent use of structured task organization with clear phase/subtask breakdown
Documentation of each phase completion in build-progress.txt with timestamps
Standardized commit message format with auto-claude prefix and task identification
Use of JSON implementation plans for tracking task dependencies and status
Separation of configuration files (._.*) from actual project files
Comprehensive change logging in COMMIT_SUMMARY.md files
gotchas_discovered: macOS resource fork files (._.*) are being created and causing git index issues
Large file sizes in git diff due to many binary files being added
Need for manual commit instructions when macOS resource files are involved
Binary file conflicts in git due to filesystem differences between platforms

approach_outcome.strategy: Dependency management approach focused on adding virtual scrolling packages systematically
approach_outcome.execution: Successfully added collection package to pubspec.yaml in Performance & Optimization section
approach_outcome.result: All virtual scrolling dependencies (flutter_sticky_headers, collection) are now available for Phase 2 implementation
approach_outcome.efficiency: Task completed with minimal changes, focused specifically on package addition
approach_outcome.completeness: Comprehensive documentation and status tracking maintained throughout process

recommendations: Create a script to automatically handle macOS resource fork files during git operations
Consider using .gitattributes to normalize line endings and prevent filesystem issues
Implement pre-commit hooks to validate pubspec.yaml changes and dependency versions
Create a package versioning strategy to avoid future conflicts
Document the complete virtual scrolling implementation plan for Phase 2 subtasks 2-5
Add integration tests for the newly added collection package utilities
